meta.note: locked = played-match scores {matchNo:[homeGoals,awayGoals]}; ratings per team. teams/fixtures are fixed for the tournament. formYears=per-team 1/3/5y W-D-L; h2h=all-time pairwise record + last 5 meetings (top-16 contenders, symmetric).
